description: Letter addressed to Abū ʿImrān, in Zuqāq al-[...], Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. Of the body of the letter, only the lower right corner remains. Difficult to determine the content. Mentions various family members and either the king (al-malik) or the property (al-mulk).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
